overall.description: Aerial drone footage from Cyberpunk 2077 capturing a futuristic corporate cityscape during golden hour. The camera slowly pans left across towering megastructures including Militech and Petrochem headquarters, with neon signage illuminating the warm dusk sky as the view opens toward a distant bay.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate megastructure district with neon signage

agents.ego_description: slowly panning aerial camera across the skyline to survey the corporate towers

entered.detail: tall black skyscraper with large yellow MILITECH signage and vertical light strips
dark corporate building with prominent red neon PETROCHEM logo and envelope symbol
hazy silhouette of additional skyscrapers fading into the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a sweeping aerial view of Night City's corporate district at dusk. The Militech tower dominates the right side with its bright yellow signage, while the Petrochem building glows with red neon on the left. The camera drifts slowly leftward, maintaining focus on these megastructures against a warm golden sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront corporate district with bay view

events.description: Militech building exits frame right as view opens toward the distant bay

agents.ego_description: continuing leftward pan to reveal the biotech tower and waterfront skyline

entered.detail: dark skyscraper with distinctive white circular tri-leaf logo glowing on its facade
calm water visible between buildings reflecting the dusk sky
distant building with KANG TAO corporate signage visible on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning left, the Militech tower exits the frame and a massive biotech building with a white circular logo becomes the new focal point on the left. The view opens to reveal a distant bay between the towers, with the Petrochem building now shifted toward the center-right and Kang Tao signage visible in the far distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial pan across a futuristic corporate district that shifts from a focus on towering megastructures to a wider vista of the city's coastal edge. It begins with a sweeping view of the Militech tower and its bright yellow signage dominating the right, while the Petrochem building glows with red neon on the left against a warm golden sky. As the camera drifts slowly leftward, the Militech tower exits the frame, allowing a massive biotech building with a white circular logo to emerge as the new focal point. The scene then opens to reveal a distant bay nestled between the skyscrapers, shifting the Petrochem building toward the center-right. Finally, the perspective expands further to uncover Kang Tao signage shimmering in the far distance under the dusk light.
